attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT WG.DW_WORKGROUP_KEY,
WG.NATURAL_KEY,
C3WG.BL_WORKGROUP_KEY,
C3WG.WORKGROUP_NAME,
C3WG.WORKGROUP_DESC,
C3WG.WKG_MGR_RESOURCE_ID,
C3WG.MANAGER_NAME,
C3WG.MANAGER_EMAIL,
C3WG.SUB_REGION_NAME,
C3WG.THEATER_NAME,
C3WG.DELIVERY_CHANNEL,
C3WG.OUTSOURCER_NAME,
C3WG.SERVICE_LINE,
C3WG.SERVICE_TYPE,
C3WG.BL_ACTIVE_FLAG,
C3WG.BL_DELETE_FLAG,
C3WG.TECH_ID,
C3WG.WG_ACTIVE_FLAG,
CL.BL_TAC_CENTER_LINE_KEY,
CL.TAC_CENTER_LINE_ID,
CL.RESOURCE_SITE_ID,
CL.CENTER_LINE_ENABLED_FLAG,
CL.CENTER_LINE_BL_DELETE_FLAG,
C.BL_TAC_CENTER_KEY,
C.TAC_CENTER_ID,
C.TAC_CENTER_NAME,
C.CENTER_NLP_REPORTING_FLAG,
C.CENTER_ENABLED_FLAG,
WORKGROUP_SHIFT,
WORKGROUP_SITE,
WORKGROUP_SHIFTCENTER,
HARDWARE_NONHARDWARE,
FUNDING_SOURCE,
WG_TECHNOLOGY_GROUPING,
WG_TECHNOLOGY,
WG_ENGINEER_TYPE,
WG.WG_DL,
WG.WG_DL_MASTER_THEATER,
WG.WG_DELIVERY_LEADER,
WG.WG_DELIVERY_LEADER_DEPT,
WG.WG_SURVEY_TYPE,
WG.WG_SAMPLING_SIZE
FROM (SELECT OBJECT_NUMBER AS DW_WORKGROUP_KEY,NATURAL_KEY,WORK_GROUP_TECHNOLOGY,DELIVERY_CHANNEL,SHIFT_TIMES_GMT_START,SHIFT_TIMES_GMT_END,SERVICE_LINE
,SERVICE_TYPE,MANAGER_NAME,MANAGER_EMAIL,WORKGROUP_SHIFT,WORKGROUP_SITE,WORKGROUP_SHIFTCENTER,HARDWARE_NONHARDWARE,FUNDING_SOURCE,WG_TECHNOLOGY_GROUPING,WG_TECHNOLOGY
,WG_ENGINEER_TYPE,WG_DL,WG_DL_MASTER_THEATER,WG_DELIVERY_LEADER,WG_DELIVERY_LEADER_DEPT,WG_SURVEY_TYPE,WG_SAMPLING_SIZE
FROM $$STGDB.ST_WG_L_WORK_GROUP) WG
LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT * FROM (
SELECT DISTINCT CAST(BL_WORKGROUP_KEY AS INT) AS BL_WORKGROUP_KEY
,WORKGROUP_ID AS C3WG_WORKGROUP_ID,WORKGROUP_NAME,WORKGROUP_DESC
,WKG_MGR_RESOURCE_ID AS WKG_MGR_RESOURCE_ID,CONCAT (WKG_MGR_FIRST_NAME,' ',WKG_MGR_LAST_NAME) AS MANAGER_NAME
,WKG_MGR_EMAIL AS MANAGER_EMAIL,SUB_REGION_NAME,THEATER_NAME,DELIVERY_CHANNEL_TYPE AS DELIVERY_CHANNEL
,UPPER(OUTSOURCER_NAME) OUTSOURCER_NAME,SERVICE_LINE_NAME AS SERVICE_LINE,SERVICE_TYPE,BL_ACTIVE_FLAG
,BL_DELETE_FLAG,TECH_ID,ACTIVE_FLAG AS WG_ACTIVE_FLAG
,BL_EFFECTIVE_TO_DATE,MAX(BL_EFFECTIVE_TO_DATE) OVER (PARTITION BY WORKGROUP_ID) AS MAX_BL_EFFECTIVE_TO_DATE
FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_TSS_WORKGROUPS_D
) X
WHERE BL_EFFECTIVE_TO_DATE = MAX_BL_EFFECTIVE_TO_DATE)C3WG
ON WG.NATURAL_KEY = C3WG.C3WG_WORKGROUP_ID
LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT * FROM (
SELECT DISTINCT WORKGROUP_ID
,BL_TAC_CENTER_LINE_KEY 
,TAC_CENTER_LINE_ID
,TAC_CENTER_ID
,RESOURCE_SITE_ID
,ENABLED_FLAG AS CENTER_LINE_ENABLED_FLAG
,BL_DELETE_FLAG AS CENTER_LINE_BL_DELETE_FLAG
,BL_EFFECTIVE_TO_DATE
,MAX(BL_EFFECTIVE_TO_DATE) OVER (PARTITION BY WORKGROUP_ID) AS MAX_BL_EFFECTIVE_TO_DATE
FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_TSS_TAC_CENTER_LINES_D
) X
WHERE BL_EFFECTIVE_TO_DATE = MAX_BL_EFFECTIVE_TO_DATE )CL
ON CL.WORKGROUP_ID = WG.NATURAL_KEY
LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT * FROM (
SELECT BL_TAC_CENTER_KEY
,TAC_CENTER_ID
,TAC_CENTER_NAME
,NLP_REPORTING_FLAG AS CENTER_NLP_REPORTING_FLAG
,ENABLED_FLAG AS CENTER_ENABLED_FLAG
,BL_EFFECTIVE_TO_DATE
,MAX(BL_EFFECTIVE_TO_DATE) OVER (PARTITION BY TAC_CENTER_ID) AS MAX_BL_EFFECTIVE_TO_DATE
FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_TSS_TAC_CENTERS_D
) X
WHERE BL_EFFECTIVE_TO_DATE = MAX_BL_EFFECTIVE_TO_DATE
)C 
ON  C.TAC_CENTER_ID = CL.TAC_CENTER_ID
